---

## Notable Early Organic Wins

- **"small engine repair sault ste marie" at position 2.1** — This is our #1 target zero-competition term. Ranking top 3 in 9 days is exceptional. Expect first clicks within 2–3 weeks as the service page stabilizes in the index. No content changes needed; let it compound.

- **Local dealer queries converting:** "sault ste marie boat dealers" (pos 2.3), "boat dealers sault ste marie" (pos 1.5) already driving clicks. Reyco is establishing the dominant local dealer position.

- **Mercury & Cub Cadet dealer intent:** "mercury outboard dealer near me" (pos 1.0), "cub cadet dealer near me" (pos 1.5) — zero clicks yet but strong position signals. Authorized dealer pages need inventory depth to convert.

- **"lawnmower repair near me" at pos 1.0 with a click** — Misspelling of our tracked term. Service page IS ranking #1 locally. Tracked variant ("lawn mower repair near me") will follow once Google stabilizes the canonical.

> **Action item flagged:** `/aboutus` has 201 impressions but only 1 click (0.5% CTR). A stronger meta description would 3–5x this. Queued for intent-saturation copy pass.

## Coverage Issues

None detected. Sitemap clean (0 errors, 0 warnings). No crawl blocks apparent from GSC data.

---

## Core Web Vitals

Not available. CrUX field data requires ~28 days of real-user traffic before GSC populates CWV. Check at the 30-day mark (June 2, 2026).

---

## What This Baseline Tells Us

1. **The new site is healthy.** 107 clicks and 1,296 impressions in 9 days for a brand-new local SMB site is solid. No crawl errors, no coverage flags, no sitewide penalty signals.

2. **Brand is locked.** "Reyco marine" ranks #1 with 38% CTR. Brand equity transferred cleanly from the old site.

3. **Local dealer intent is winning early.** SSM boat dealer queries are top 3 already. Reyco is the dominant local result.

4. **Service category is starting to fire.** Position 2.1 for "small engine repair sault ste marie" at Day 9 is the single strongest early organic signal. This is the zero-competition revenue keyword we flagged pre-launch. No intervention needed — watch for first clicks in 2–3 weeks.

5. **55/57 tracked keywords still at baseline zero.** This is normal and expected. The 30-day and 60-day snapshots will show real movement.
